howItWorks.title: How FXPayout Works in 4 Simple Steps
howItWorks.paragraph: Without changing your strategy, you simply trade as usual. FXPayout takes care of the commission flow into cashback for you.

workflows.title: START
workflows.subtitle: Register via the official FXPayout link
workflows.paragraph: Create an FXPayout account and link your trading account through the official link we provide from your chosen broker.

workflows.title: TRADE
workflows.subtitle: Trade as usual with your broker
workflows.paragraph: Continue your trading activities without changing spreads, leverage, or other conditions. Everything follows the broker's rules.

workflows.title: COMMISSION
workflows.subtitle: Broker sends IB commission to FXPayout
workflows.paragraph: Based on the lot volume you trade, the broker automatically sends the IB commission to FXPayout.

workflows.title: REBATE
workflows.subtitle: Up to 90% rebate to your account
workflows.paragraph: We return up to 90% of that commission as cashback, which can be withdrawn quickly via local banks or e-wallets.

rewards.title: Bonus Rebate +10% for New Accounts
rewards.paragraph: Enjoy a limited-time promo specifically for traders who just joined FXPayout.

reviews.title: What Do Traders Who Use FXPayout Say?
reviews.paragraph: Real experiences from traders earning additional profit from the rebate program.

profile.title: FXPayout, the main reference for forex rebates for traders.
profile.paragraph: FXPayout is known as a forex rebate platform that returns up to 90% of broker commissions, prioritizing fast payments and local support services for traders.

header.title: Broker Partners and Details
header.paragraph: Selected brokers with top-tier execution and rebate schemes of up to 90%. Compare instrument details and choose the broker that best fits your trading strategy.

notify.title: Rebate Transparency
notify.paragraph: We store commission and rebate history that can be audited by users. (Demo: data is stored in the browser.)

header.title: Calculate Your Trading Rebate Estimate Now
header.paragraph: Enter your broker, account type, and total trading lots to discover the rebate estimates you can earn every month fast, transparent, and at no cost.
